title: Emerald Tools
description: A mod that adds emerald tools to minecraft
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5099c7ab6bdb16867be385ac8a402d4988d034b_0.webp)
# Description:




This is a mod that adds emerald tools.

Emerald tools are kinda a middle point between iron tools and diamond tools,but they have some stats that are better that the diamond ones.

Compared to the diamond tools,they have a similar durability,but less enchantability,because I did not want them to be too overpowered.

This was created with MCreator.
